sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90543" key="protomi/zesqai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προτομίζεσθαι</orth> (<sense id="n90543.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">-τολμ-</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit>)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">· προάρχεσθαι </foreign>(<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">προέρχ-</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
